name: Friendship Cake Mix Style One
recipeIngredient: 1 package Instant vanilla pudding mix, 3 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. See recipe, Brandied Fruit Starter for Friendship Cake.
2. Combine pudding, oil, eggs, and cake mix. Beat 3 minutes at medium speed.
3. With a spoon, blend fruit, floured nuts, and raisins into the batter.
4. Pour or spoon the mixture into a greased and floured Bundt pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40-50 minutes.
